notableEvents.label: TJ Rumfield GIDP
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. TJ Rumfield out at 1st.
